general.intro_p1: <0>Ball Dynamics</0> is a tactical football game played in <1>synchronized turns</1>. It's not real-time: each turn, every player picks their actions during short phases (about 7 seconds each), and the engine resolves everything at once at the end.
general.intro_p2: You control <0>a single player</0> (as a Player) or <1>an entire team</1> (as a Manager). The goal is simple: score more goals than your opponent over two halves.
general.flow_step1: Positioning (only on kickoff, foul, throw-in, goal-kick)

phases.positioning_body: Before set-piece restarts (kickoff, foul, throw-in, goal-kick, corner). Each team can freely reposition all of its players before the play. The team with the ball positions first, then the defending team.
phases.ball_holder_body: Only the player with the ball acts. Choose between: <0>low pass</0>, <1>high pass</1>, <2>long ball</2>, <3>controlled shot</3>, <4>power shot</4> or <5>dribble</5> (move). Holding the ball still is also an option.
phases.attacking_body: Players from the team with the ball move WITHOUT the ball. Other attackers can <0>Receive</0> passes that travel through them (purple circle). If the holder passed or shot, they can take a small follow-up move. If they dribbled, they keep the ball at the end of the dribble.
phases.defending_body: The team without the ball acts. They can <0>Tackle</0> dribblers, <1>Intercept</1> passes, <2>Block</2> shots, or just reposition. Goalkeepers can <3>Catch</3> or <4>Parry</4>.
phases.resolution_body: The engine resolves everything: it calculates contests (tackles, saves), animates movements, decides goals, and sets up the next turn.

actions.green_circle_body: You can move, but you can't reach the ball or the pass/shot trajectory.
actions.purple_circle_body: You CAN interact with the ball/trajectory. When you click, the menu opens with the relevant options: Receive, Tackle, Slide tackle, Block, or Parry.
actions.ball_zone_green: <0>Green</0>: ball on the ground — can be received with the foot.
actions.ball_zone_red: <0>Red</0>: ball too high — no interaction possible.
actions.inertia_body: After you confirm a move, an orange arrow appears at the end of your movement. It represents the <0>inertia power</0> you carry into the next turn. Drag the cursor to set 0–100% and click anywhere to confirm.
actions.inertia_100: <0>100%</0>: maximum speed in the same direction, maximum penalty for reversing.
actions.inertia_0: <0>0%</0>: no bonus or penalty — you can go in any direction equally next turn.
actions.one_touch_body: When you're in the yellow zone (header) or green zone close to the end of the pass, you can receive AND pass/shoot first-time without waiting for the next turn. The menu shows options marked with ⚡ when available.

shortcuts.intro: FIFA-PC style layout (left hand). With the action menu open, press the matching letter directly — no need to click. Heading uses the SAME key as the equivalent pass/shot, holding Shift.
shortcuts.row_ball_title: ⚽ Ball at feet (A S D F W)
shortcuts.row_header_title: 🤸 Heading — Shift + A S D F
shortcuts.row_other_title: 🛡️ Movement and defense (Q E R T Z)
shortcuts.one_touch_note: 💡 For one-touch play, just press the action key during the interception/receive prompt — the game picks up on the context.
